acquisition method: MS data was acquired using a data-dependent top10 method dynamically choosing the most abundant precursor ions
cleavage agent: digested with trypsin (Promega) at a trypsin-to-protein ratio of 1:50
collision energy: The normalized collision energy was 27 eV
enrichment method: immune-enriched using a di-Gly-Lys-specific monoclonal antibody
instrument: conducted on a Q Exactive mass spectrometer
labeling: peptides were injected for LC–MS/MS analysis
